title: Daily-vlog brand kit: color-graded thumbnails, end-screen + lower-third plates, story-format still, reframed clip and cleaned VO
one_line_ask: Build the recurring per-episode still brand kit for a daily-life vlog — color-grade the supplied frame-grab and shot stills to one consistent "personal, upbeat" look, produce a subject-pop YouTube thumbnail plus a 9:16 story-format still, vectorize the channel wordmark into clean lower-third and end-screen plates, gather it all on a Firefly board, and ship a same-length social reframe of one clip with a denoised voice-over.

issues: Slight left-lean tilt (~2-3°, within acceptable brief tolerance)
Background bookshelf slightly busy but depth-of-field separation is adequate
Minor luminance noise visible in shadow areas of navy shirt — within brief tolerance
Shadows are slightly underexposed but within acceptable brief parameters
Depth of field and background bokeh is slightly shallower than a typical video frame grab would produce, leaning mildly toward stills photography look
Hand gesture blur is subtle but present and consistent with brief spec
No significant AI artifacts detected — fingers, facial features, and hair all render naturally

assets.name: channel_wordmark.png

issues: Slight visible export halo around text and play button (acceptable for source asset)
Minor luminance noise in solid fills (acceptable for source asset)
Background is transparent as required, but checkerboard pattern visible (expected in preview, not an issue for PNG alpha)
Edges are crisp but could be slightly sharper for vectorization (minor, not penalized heavily)
Slight shadow/ghost artifact visible behind the play button glyph on left edge — minor, designer-fixable
Background appears near-white rather than fully transparent in some quadrants of the checker preview, suggesting partial alpha — verify channel integrity before handoff

assets.note: regenerated on solid flat bg then alpha-keyed to true transparency (no painted checkerboard); crisp centered PRINCERRR lockup for clean vectorize

assets.name: hero_clip_12s_4k.mp4

qc.note: regenerated 16:9 horizontal (i2v from framegrab); preview-frame realism panel 9/9; frames 15 & 45 visually confirmed — same creator + window-lit apartment, no brands/garbled text. Silent raw source footage (audio comes from separate VO track), 24fps.

assets.note: Seedance-2.0 migration attempted but NOT applied: this is a single-creator brand-kit person scene requiring the SAME creator as hero_framegrab_4k.png / creator_dslr_shot.png. 2.0 t2v produced a brand-clean but DIFFERENT-looking man (identity break), and 2.0 i2v content-policy rejects animating the real-person framegrab still. Kept the brand-clean Seedance-1.0-Pro i2v version (regenerated 16:9 from the framegrab) as the only path that is both brand-clean AND identity-correct. final_model=kept-1.0-unmigratable. Same creator + window-lit apartment, talking to camera, no brands/garbled text.
